name: DTE ENERGY CO
summary: DTE Energy Co is a diversified energy company headquartered in Michigan. It operates through subsidiaries including DTE Electric, which provides electric utility services, and DTE Gas, which provides natural gas utility services. The company also engages in non-utility businesses including energy trading and marketing of natural gas, electricity, and environmental commodities.

products.name: Electric Utility Service
products.description: Generation, transmission, and distribution of electricity through DTE Electric subsidiary.

products.name: Natural Gas Utility Service
products.description: Distribution and storage of natural gas through DTE Gas subsidiary.

products.name: Natural Gas Commodity Contracts
products.description: Trading and marketing of natural gas commodity contracts.

products.name: Electricity Commodity Contracts
products.description: Trading and marketing of electricity commodity contracts.

products.name: Environmental and Other Commodity Contracts
products.description: Trading and marketing of environmental and other commodity contracts.
